CIPHER.250.cipherString: Ridicule often settles matters of importance better and more effectually than severity.
CIPHER.250.question: Horace offers us some advice that has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.250.author: Horace

CIPHER.225.cipherString: If men will not act for themselves, what will they do when the benefit of their effort is for all?
CIPHER.225.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Elbert Hubbard, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ATWILL somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.225.author: Elbert Hubbard

CIPHER.242.cipherString: A relationship is like another job, you know, you have to work at it all the time.
CIPHER.242.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote by Candice Swanepoel, encoded using a Checkerboard Cipher. The deciphered text starts with ARELATIONS. What does it say?
CIPHER.242.author: Candice Swanepoel

CIPHER.234.cipherString: It is impossible to travel faster than light, and certainly not desirable, as one's hat keeps blowing off.
CIPHER.234.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Woody Allen, encoded with an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains OFF. What does it say?
CIPHER.234.author: Woody Allen

CIPHER.241.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 218465 3826 7096 decode to?

CIPHER.247.cipherString: In mathematics, in science, and in life, we constantly face the delicate, tricky task of separating design from happenstance.
CIPHER.247.question: Your science fair project logs contain a mysterious string of letters. It's a quote by Ivars Peterson, encoded as a Patristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with INM. What does it say?
CIPHER.247.author: Ivars Peterson

CIPHER.229.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain which you recognize as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 021316 5240 86768 decode to?

CIPHER.236.cipherString: Well, it's very dangerous to project, but it's clear that the existing technology has some more years to go.
CIPHER.236.question: A mysterious app update added this Aristocrat lock screen—it's actually Jack Kilby's quote. You are told that the cipher contains IT'S twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.236.author: Jack Kilby

CIPHER.245.cipherString: Nobody can make you feel inferior without your permission.
CIPHER.245.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Eleanor Roosevelt encoded with a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of OPENLY and Polybius key of ALCHEMIST. What does it say?
CIPHER.245.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

CIPHER.230.cipherString: Men think they are quarrelling with one another, and both sides feel that they are in the wrong.
CIPHER.230.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Aristocrat encoded quote by Goethe using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.230.author: Goethe

CIPHER.235.cipherString: The man who interprets Nature is always held in great honor.
CIPHER.235.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Zora Neale Hurston, written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.235.author: Zora Neale Hurston

CIPHER.249.cipherString: Only when one has lost all curiosity about the future has one reached the age to write an autobiography.
CIPHER.249.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Evelyn Waugh encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.249.author: Evelyn Waugh

CIPHER.233.cipherString: Not caring more about what other people think than what you think. That's freedom.
CIPHER.233.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this Complete Columnar string by Demi Moore. The quote has THER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.233.author: Demi Moore

CIPHER.232.cipherString: Mis amigos no parecen ser amigos en absoluto, sino personas cuyos números de teléfono no he perdido.
CIPHER.232.question: Found inside a hollowed-out periodic table book: this Xenocrypt Cipher in Spanish hides Nick Hornby's insight using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.232.author: Nick Hornby
CIPHER.232.translation: my friends don't seem to be friends at all but people whose phone numbers I haven't lost.

CIPHER.221.question: A glitchy hologram in the school planetarium displays this Hill encoded quote using a keyword of FIND. What does it say?
CIPHER.221.author: French

CIPHER.226.cipherString: Even though I was theatrically trained, learning to develop a character was an awesome experience.
CIPHER.226.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Corin Nemec, encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.226.author: Corin Nemec

CIPHER.231.cipherString: Stop making excuses of why you can't or how hard it is and start making your life matter.
CIPHER.231.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip under a Bunsen burner. It's a quote by John Patrick Hickey, encoded with a Checkerboard Cipher with a Polybius key of SCHEDULING. What does it say?
CIPHER.231.author: John Patrick Hickey

CIPHER.244.cipherString: Only when our love for someone exceeds our need for them do we have a shot at a genuine relationship together.
CIPHER.244.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's a quote by Neil Strauss, written in an Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.244.author: Neil Strauss

CIPHER.237.cipherString: Success is not to be pursued, it is to be attracted by the person you become.
CIPHER.237.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Checkerboard puzzle by Jim Rohn with a Polybius key of PYRAMIDS. What does it say?
CIPHER.237.author: Jim Rohn

CIPHER.238.cipherString: Reality did not take long to intrude.
CIPHER.238.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Baconian version of a Niall Ferguson quote. You are told that the deciphered text starts with REAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.238.author: Niall Ferguson

CIPHER.223.cipherString: If you lie upon roses when young, you will lie upon thorns when old.
CIPHER.223.question: The vending machine gave you a slip with a Proverb hidden in a Nihilist Substitution cipher with a keyword length of 6. The 39th through 50th cipher units (33 59 68 56 35 24 25 68 76 56 37 26) decode to be ONTHORNSWHEN. What does it say?
CIPHER.223.author: Proverb

CIPHER.228.cipherString: Let's face it - the only way to truly make a lasting impact is by embracing change and standing out from the crowd.
CIPHER.228.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Felecia Etienne, encrypted using an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.228.author: Felecia Etienne

CIPHER.248.cipherString: The structural analysis of shells has had a long and difficult history.
CIPHER.248.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You notice that it's encoded as a Porta using a keyword of MORSEL. What does it say?

CIPHER.224.cipherString: The mother principle is that governments are republican only in proportion as they embody the will of their people, and execute it..
CIPHER.224.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Thomas Jefferson, written as a Patristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains EIT. What does it say?
CIPHER.224.author: Thomas Jefferson

CIPHER.222.cipherString: La satisfacción consiste en liberarse del dolor, que es el elemento positivo de la existencia.
CIPHER.222.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Xenocrypt-encrypted quote by Schopenhauer in Spanish using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.222.author: Schopenhauer
CIPHER.222.translation: Satisfaction consists in freedom from pain, which is the positive element of existence.

CIPHER.243.cipherString: Men lived like fishes; the great ones devoured the small.
CIPHER.243.question: A laser-etched message on the inside of a geodes crystal reads: solve this Nihilist Substitution version of Algernon Sidney's wisdom with a keyword of TRASHY and Polybius key of DANGEROUSLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.243.author: Algernon Sidney

CIPHER.240.cipherString: One stumble is enough to deface the character of an honorable life.
CIPHER.240.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote by L'Estrange in a Porta. The 41st through 47th cipher characters (RMWHFBA) decode to be ANHONOR. What does it say?
CIPHER.240.author: L'Estrange

CIPHER.246.cipherString: What part of your family can you see through? A transparent.
CIPHER.246.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Baconian encoded quote. What does it say?
CIPHER.246.author: Unknown

CIPHER.239.cipherString: Your body's really only meant to compete at the highest levels of combat sports for a few years.
CIPHER.239.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by Joe Rogan using the Aristocrat Cipher with a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.239.author: Joe Rogan

CIPHER.227.cipherString: There's always a source for humor.
CIPHER.227.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Hill message by Calvin Trillin with a keyword of SUBFIELDS. What does it say?
CIPHER.227.author: Calvin Trillin
